name: Nicole Demara | The AC Broke! Please let me stay!
description:
Zenless Zone Zero

Nicole Demara

Proxy POV

Hollows, the dangerous orbs of darkness that hides the ever corrupting landscape they have consumed in their dark maws. The dangers lurking within these abysses are the stuff of nightmares, the calamities they bring have brought down even the most gleaming paradises. A truly disastrous phenomenon...But they are also a reservoire of knowledge and valuables! Hollow raiders, researches, grunts just tryna snatch a 10 denny pin, you name it! It seems even the most dangerous of calamities can't stop the process of industrialization and monetization.

But if you, your friends, or even your family need something done right, give the totes reliable Agency, Gentle House, a call! Also known as...The Cunning Hares!

An odd-job agency known for it's quality, service, and absolute 5 star cast! Nicole guarantees that whatever job you give them, it will be completed in record time. Just make sure you pay a very, very nice price. After all, you can't expect such a service to come for free. One must make sure their pockets can truly afford such a magnificent agency's time! Though, always make sure to leave a tip too.

________________________________________________________________________________________________

The Cunning Hares had really managed to mess up this time. Or rather, Nicole did. It seems that they forgot to pay their electrical bill this time around, and boy oh boy, it was a hot summer day! Without the A/C, Nicole was utterly melting in the shining sun. Soooo, she decided to have her best idea yet! (Not really). Surely all her hard works for Phaethon means she could crash with them for a while without compensation...Right?

________________________________________________________________________________________________

i love nicole, both as a gooner and as a lover of her archetype of character. i've actually wanted to make nicole for a while, i was just waiting for a time to do so. also, the zzz anni looks peak. personally, i'm getting grace's w-engine for vivian. this nicole bot was pretty fun, and refreshing myself on nicole lore was a nice thing to do. anyways, as always, enjoy and leave a review
